headline: New Report from The BlackRock Foundation and Commonwealth Confirms Surging Investor Participation Among Millions of Americans Living on Low and Moderate Incomes
summary: NEW YORK & BOSTON, March 02, 2026--Today, The BlackRock Foundation and Commonwealth released their latest report, Retail Investors on the Rise, a large-scale analysis of transaction data, offering a view into how Americans living on low and moderate incomes (LMI) are investing. headline: JPMorgan to Start Debt Deal for $55 Billion EA Buyout Next Week
summary: The largest US bank is hosting a leveraged finance conference in Miami Beach this week, where Andrew Wilson, Electronic Arts’ chief executive officer, will take meetings with some of the largest speculative-grade debt investors for anchor commitments on the financing, which will be about $20 billion in total, said the person, who asked not to be named because the information isn’t public.  A representative for JPMorgan declined to comment.  A representative for Electronic Arts didn’t immediately respond to a request for comment.

content.title: JPMorgan to Start Debt Deal for $55 Billion EA Buyout Next Week
content.summary: The largest US bank is hosting a leveraged finance conference in Miami Beach this week, where Andrew Wilson, Electronic Arts’ chief executive officer, will take meetings with some of the largest speculative-grade debt investors for anchor commitments on the financing, which will be about $20 billion in total, said the person, who asked not to be named because the information isn’t public.  A representative for JPMorgan declined to comment.  A representative for Electronic Arts didn’t immediately respond to a request for comment.

headline: JPMorgan Balances Tricolor Fraud Lawsuit With AI And Branch Expansion
summary: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) is facing a lawsuit alleging the bank enabled fraud tied to bankrupt auto lender Tricolor Holdings by concealing key audit findings. At the same time, the bank is rolling out a large scale branch expansion focused on underserved rural and low to moderate income communities across the US. The company is also ramping up artificial intelligence adoption, with implications for efficiency, risk management, and how its workforce is structured. For investors watching...

headline: JPMorgan CEO Dimon on Iran War, Inflation, Credit Cycles
